---
applyTo: 'src/**,tests/**,**/Directory.*.props,Optional.slnx'
---
# TUnit Instructions

TUnit is a modern testing framework for .NET applications. We're using it to write and run unit tests for our codebase. This document provides instructions on how to set up, write, and run tests using TUnit.

## Documentation Sources

The TUnit source and documentation are available locally in the `external/thomhurst/TUnit` submodule. There are multiple documents with information on specific topics. Navigate the document tree to find the information you need and retrieve the appropriate documents. Below are links to the document root as well as some specific documents or nodes from the tree that will often be useful.

- Documentation Root: `external/thomhurst/TUnit/docs/docs`
- Getting Started: `external/thomhurst/TUnit/docs/docs/getting-started`
  - Installation Guide: `external/thomhurst/TUnit/docs/docs/getting-started/installation.md`
  - Running Your Tests: `external/thomhurst/TUnit/docs/docs/getting-started/running-your-tests.md`
  - Writing Your First Test: `external/thomhurst/TUnit/docs/docs/getting-started/writing-your-first-test.md`
- Guides: `external/thomhurst/TUnit/docs/docs/guides`
- Test Lifecycle: `external/thomhurst/TUnit/docs/docs/test-lifecycle`
- Test Authoring: `external/thomhurst/TUnit/docs/docs/test-authoring`
- Assertions: `external/thomhurst/TUnit/docs/docs/assertions`
- Troubleshooting: `external/thomhurst/TUnit/docs/docs/troubleshooting.md`
